summary: Do not ship: the new move-triggered auto-dispatch bypasses the gateway liveness guard, so dragging a card onto an immediate list while the gateway is down will immediately park it in `needs-attention` and report `dispatched: true` anyway.

findings.title: Move-to-immediate auto-dispatch still spam-parks cards when the gateway is down
findings.recommendation: Gate `handlePatchCard` auto-dispatch behind the same reachability check used by `kanban.mjs` before calling `processCard`, or make the background path leave the card on the target list when the gateway is unreachable. As written, `parseArgs` always supplies a default gateway URL (`127.0.0.1:${GARRISON_GATEWAY_PORT||4777}` at lines 685-687), so any move onto `plan`/`implement`/etc. fires a fetch even when nothing is listening; `processCard` then converts that transport failure into `needs-attention`, reintroducing the exact lost-work/spam-park behavior this slice says `gatewayReachable()` avoids for scheduler ticks.
